category_sources: Official Red Hat prelink archive is the upstream distribution surface for execstack.
source_facts.description: utility to set, clear, or query executable stack bit.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Red Hat prelink archive; this is the best official documentation/download surface found for execstack.
repo_sources: Official Red Hat prelink page publishes release tarballs, but no official source-control project URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names executable stack bit operations.
source_facts.executables lists execstack as the command-line utility.
